content.en:
Ye Tian sneered in his heart, the Void Golden Peng's Void Golden Wheel Mark, he was naturally not afraid.

Just one mark can only kill his copy body, not all of his body.

So, he could completely ignore this mark.

Of course, he still showed fear on the surface, and nodded repeatedly to indicate that he was willing to enter and take out the treasure.

Then, at the urging of the Void Golden Peng, he entered this inheritance land.

......

"The invincible inheritance land of the sixth realm, I don't know what danger there is. "

As soon as Ye Tian came here, he didn't encounter danger, he only felt that this piece of heaven and earth was full of endless killing machines, and in the extreme distance, there was a huge stone monument.

Other than that, there is nothing.

He immediately began to condense the second copy body, so that even if the Void Golden Peng immediately wiped out one of his copy bodies of "Six Six Zero", his other copy body would still be here and would not be affected.

"It's a dangerous part of the road!"

Ye Tian didn't rush over, he saw that there were a lot of Fifth Realms that had fallen in this distance, and those corpses of the Fifth Realm were there, already full of holes.

He urged the Sixfold Dimensional Void to spread.

In an instant, a wave of killing machines attacked, directly breaking his six-dimensional void, and a wisp of killing machines attacked, directly hitting his body.

"What a terrifying power!"

Ye Tian frowned slightly.

That is to say, he can be called invincible in the fifth realm, so he can withstand a wisp of killing and immortality, if it is the other fifth realm, he will die directly in this wave of temptation just now.

It's no wonder that so many Fifth Realms have died here, and they can't withstand the killing machine.

"It is worthy of being the invincible inheritance place of the sixth realm, it is simply not a chance for the normal fifth realm, you have to study it carefully to see if there is any way to pass. "

Ye Tian sat cross-legged and studied here.

......

Outside.

On this side of the 4,000th Territory, the influence of the Death Multidimensional Tribulation continues to threaten the Fifth Realm, and many Death Multidimensional Tribulation creatures have been born.

Each of these creatures is the strength of the Fifth Realm, and even if they encounter an ordinary Fifth Realm, they may be easily killed.

As for the multi-dimensional life of the sixth realm, it has not yet appeared.

Unless it is a very important chance to be born, the sixth realm multi-dimensional life will not come out.

The original intention of the Sixth Realm Multidimensional Life was to compete for chance, not to destroy the extradimensional realm.

Anyway, in a short period of time, those Fifth Realms will not die, and Ye Tian is also worried about the safety of the human race.

Moreover, the Death Multidimensional Tribulation lasts for a long time, at least a billion extradimensional epochs.

Time flies.

Tens of thousands of extradimensional epochs have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian already had a preliminary idea of how to spend this distance.

The killing machine here is actually the killing machine of the multi-dimensional tribulation, which was condensed to the extreme by the invincible existence of the Sixth Realm, and then arranged here in the situation of the formation, turning into a natural killing machine array.

Whoever comes in and touches the killing machine here will be attacked.

If you want to directly destroy this killing array, you will definitely not be able to do it without the strength of the peak of the sixth realm.

Or comprehend the rules of the sevenfold dimension, cooperate with the supreme mastery of the five realms with the rules of the sevenfold dimension, and forcibly rush over, and have more than seventy percent chance of survival.

But Ye Tian was still many, much away from comprehending the rules of the sevenfold dimension.

Then, there is only one way left, to create an innate multi-dimensional Dao body that can absorb the killing power, so that you can break through.

For Ye Tian, there is only the third way at present, to create an innate multi-dimensional Dao body that absorbs this multi-dimensional catastrophe killing machine.

Afterwards.

He tested a replica of his body, drawing on the power of the killing machine himself to analyze its ingredients.

Rumble!!!!

A replica body completely fell to its death after withstanding ten consecutive wisps of killer attacks.

"The killing machine containing thirteen multi-dimensional tribulation powers, no wonder it is so terrifying!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Time passed, and in a flash, 50 million extradimensional epochs passed.

With such a long period of time, Ye Tian finally created an innate multi-dimensional dao body that could absorb killing power, but he was only a start-up, and there were only two levels of realm at present, so it was really too difficult for this innate multi-dimensional dao body to create.

But the two-layer realm was enough, enough for Ye Tian to break through.

Ye Tian named this innate multi-dimensional Dao body as a multi-dimensional killing body!

"Absorb!"

Ye Tian absorbed a wisp of killing power, and after his body forcibly carried it, he slowly absorbed and refined this wisp of killing power........

Soon, Ye Tian's multi-dimensional killing body was initially practiced.

After that, he absorbed wisps of killing machines, relied on multi-dimensional killing bodies, and lived hard, and then his resistance to killing machines increased, and he would not be easily hit hard.

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of thousands of extradimensional epochs passed, and he cultivated the multi-dimensional killing body to the realm of the second layer of Dacheng's limit.

After that, he perfected the realm of the third layer, and cultivated to the limit of the third layer of Dacheng.

It was a bit difficult to create the fourth layer, so he didn't continue to create it, and was ready to try it.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's dimensional body erupted, and with the multi-dimensional killing body, the six-dimensional void, and the five-realm supreme mastery of the ten-dimensional void technique, rushed towards the location of the stone stele.

Thundered!!!

Wisps of murderous machines attacked, as if they were going to cover Ye Tian.

If it had been before, so many killing machines would have attacked, and he would definitely be easily killed.

But now, he relied on the multi-dimensional killing body of the third layer of Dacheng Limit to weaken the attack damage of the killing machine, and he forcibly withstood it.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian crossed this distance and came to the bottom of the stone monument, but he was also severely injured.

"It's finally here!"

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

Now, the legacy is here.

"Let the replica body controlled by the Void Golden Peng be annihilated!"

Ye 4.0 days let the replica body take the initiative to enter the killing machine array, and was killed by the killing machine.

Outside the Land of Heritage.

Void Jinpeng sensed that the Void Golden Wheel mark had dissipated, and immediately frowned: "I didn't expect that even this kind of Fifth Realm invincible existence that is comparable to the weaker Sixth Realm's combat power will die here, could it be that the Fifth Realm is impossible to obtain the inheritance of that Sixth Realm?" Forget it, let's leave!"

He's kind of given up on the inheritance here.

Moreover, the multidimensional catastrophe of death has come, and it also wants to see if there is a great opportunity, and if there is, it must also participate.

......

In front of the stele.

Ye Tian's will probed into it.

Rumble!!!

He saw a majestic figure, its aura was so terrifying that a mere phantom seemed to be enough to kill him.

This is the terrifying existence of the invincible existence of the sixth realm!.
